title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Sabo, Whitebeard, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 1–5.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Sabo, Whitebeard, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It wasn't... Ace and Luffy's fault.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: And you have grown so much, hohoho!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: It's a pleasure to meet you, Brother!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: I have heard so much about you....!
